ab: shduu mihu a tuali ya shimulikuan?
en: A: Can I borrow your money?

ab: shduu! lakuza wa tuali amashimul ihu?
min’aura iaku kminathu sa tuali, shduu mihu a tuali ya shimulikuan?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，你的錢可以借我嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow your money?

ab: min’aura iaku mani kmathu sa tuali!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: min’aura iaku kminathu sa tuali, shduu mihu a tuali ya shimulikuan?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，你的錢可以借我嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow your money?

ab: ani, mihalawan ihu shminimul sa naak a tuali, niwan ihu tu rinirian.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: shduu mihu a hulus ya shimulikuan?
ch: A:你的衣服可以借我一下嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ua, arahu
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: shduu iaku amashimul mihu a patashan?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: naak a patashan shimulin sa Ilun.
en: B: My book was borrowed by Ilun.

ab: shimulikuan mihu a kangqthaan a barimbin?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ua, ariri iakin ya simaq.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: qusaziniza, ani iaku tu kminathu pashikan, shduu mihu a pashikan ya shimulikuan?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: muqay naak a pashikan latata, iasuun ita!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: haya patashan shinimul ihu iakin, ariri ihun.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: numa wa patashan ihu ya amariqaz shduu fuilh iakin.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: alhakaiza ya mriri iaku ihun sa tuali?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: anunin qa! ihu ya itia sa tuali ariri iakin.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再還我。
en: B: It's okay, you can pay me back when you have the money.

ab: shinimimul naak a tuali, alhakaiza apushuqishin uhu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: apushuqishin ya simaq.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: shinimimul naak a patashan, alhakaiza apushuqishin uhu?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: pinushuqishiza ihun patashan tilha?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你書了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return your book yesterday?

ab: haya patatash ti Tuba shimulin uhu?
en: A: Did Tuba lend you this pen?

ab: ua, shinimul iaku a patatash thuini.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: haya patatash shinimul ihu ti Tuba qa?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Tuba?

ab: ani, finariw naak a ina haya patatash.
ch: B:不是，這支筆是媽媽買的。
en: B: No, this pen was bought by my mother.

ab: ukaiza sa qtilha, ushuiwan uhu Anai mashimul qtilha.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Anai.

ab: ua, amutantu iaku shmimul qtilha.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: palalawa ihu Anai ariri iakin tuali.
en: B: Go and ask Anai to return my money.

ab: lakuza wa mihu tuali shimulin thithu?
en: A: How much money did you borrow from her?
